case_title: TARGET NATIONAL BANK VS. SEU W LAI et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LAI, SEU W DOES 1 THROUGH 15 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-16-2010
DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-05-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-05-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
